violations.text: The walk-in cooler gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Cachupa, Mos de vaca, and soup which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Food items were observed between 48-55 DF and were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The walk-in gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and walk-in fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
